text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm out shopping with Taiki Shuttle on a day off,
when...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What should I do? This whole trip is going to be a waste if I don't—

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Howdy, Flower! You sure look anxious about
something.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's nothing serious. I just can't decide which
clothes to buy.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Heck! If that's all it is, I'll help ya out. Fashion's
way more fun with a friend to shake up your
style! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: To shake up... my style?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oh! Yes, please! I'd love it if you'd join me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Wow! These diamond shoes are absolutely gorgeous! Just look at 'em sparkle! You gotta try these on!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Diamonds?! On me?! I... I...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ta-daaah! ☆ Tell me this ain't the coolest wetsuit
ya ever seen! It'd be perfect for a rainy day! ☆

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what?! You mean you'd wear something like
this out on the street?! Talk about a bold fashion
statement! Too bold for me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Now, leeet's see! ♪ What should we try next? ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Pant... You've got so much energy...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: No! Actually, I'm feeling really inspired!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The reason I wanted to go shopping today is...
Well, it's because I wanted to find clothes that
would make me look more grown-up.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But once I started looking at outfits, it felt like
nothing really suited me, and I felt too shy to try
anything on...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
That's why Taiki is so amazing! It's like she can
pull off any look.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, honey, you've got it all wrong! It doesn't take
skill to rock an outfit...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: It takes heart!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
That's what I said! Take this outfit for example—it
just shouts "active!" and "cheerful!" It's all about
matchin' the occasion! ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What's yer heart tellin' ya, Flower? What kinda
outfit and mood are ya aimin' for?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: What kind of mood... Hm...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I want something... kind... that brings a smile to
everyone's face. I want to be like a blooming
cosmos flower!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Bam! Now yer talkin'! Hold onto that feelin'!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
If that's the kinda outfit you want, then that's the
outfit you should get! I'm certain it'll look like it
was made just for you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Okay! Then... I'm gonna go look through the
shops one more time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle and I sit back and watch as a smiling
Nishino Flower runs off to find her new outfit.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Darn right she does! It'd be a crying shame if she
wasn't, seeing as she's out shopping! ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Which reminds me... A certain somebody hasn't
picked out a single thing!
choice_data_list: I guess I could buy something!
I dunno... This month's been kind of tough...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Woohoo! I was hopin' you'd be on board! ☆ Now hurry up and spill the beans on what's in your heart.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: What was your mood comin' out with me today?
choice_data_list: I was excited, just like you.
I was excited, just like you.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Just like me?! You mean your heart and mine
are... In other words...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You wanna get matchin' outfits?!
choice_data_list: Who said anything about matching outfits?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I know! Let's get a top with super frilly sleeves!
And do you remember those pants with all the
hearts?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
We need to get to the fitting room, like, right
now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having misunderstood my intentions, she runs off
to buy an outfit. This throws me into a panic, and
I give chase!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I hear ya loud 'n' clear. No worries. I'll foot the bill
today!

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry. It appears that your card is maxed out...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You're kidding!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Looks like we're both poor as church mice, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
What're you sorry for? I'm about as happy as a
pig in mud right now!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
We might not have matchin' outfits, but we sure
as all get-out have matchin' hearts! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, we head back to the academy,
cheerfully chatting about the day we had.
